passives.name: Cutpurse
passives.description: Increases your experience gain with the Medium Armor skill line by 15%. Increases your chance to successfully pickpocket by 5%.

passives.name: Robustness
passives.description: Increases your Health, Magicka, and Stamina Recovery by 90.

passives.name: Lunar Blessings
passives.description: Increase your Maximum Health, Magicka, and Stamina by 915.

passives.name: Feline Ambush
passives.description: Increases your Critical Damage and Critical Healing by 12%. Decreases your detection radius in Stealth by 3 meters.
